notes: New expert tab: 🛡️ Convoy Escort. Once you've proven yourself in combat (12 kills/raids or a Letter of Marque), take a contract to shepherd a convoy across the lanes. You command a whole fleet — your flagship plus armed escorts and freighters — and pool every ship's firepower, splitting it equally across the attackers you target. Beat off ambushes leg by leg; keep the freighters alive for the full fee (flawless runs pay a bonus). Only the flagship can field-repair, and doing so costs you the salvo.
